description: Minimal demo puzzle — press Solve to complete.
name: Example Puzzle
params_guide:
No parameters required.
Press Solve to complete the puzzle.

description: Reserved slot for a puzzle that is not coded yet.
name: Future Puzzle

description: Input correct number on the number pad.
name: PIN Code Lock

description: Tap the correct digit sequence on the numpad.
name: Number Lock
params_guide:
Key field (JSON):
  {"code": "1234", "digits": 4}

code   (required) — digits only, e.g. "0391"
digits (optional) — expected input length; defaults to length of code

description: Tap symbols in the correct order to unlock.
name: Symbol Lock
params_guide:
Key field (JSON):
  {"sequence":["☽","★","◎"],"symbols":["☽","★","◎","♛","✦","⚿"]}

sequence (required) — ordered list of symbols the player must tap
symbols  (required) — full pool of symbols shown as buttons (must contain all sequence items)

Any text string works as a symbol — use Unicode glyphs for best results.

description: Rotate each dial to the correct value and press Confirm.
name: Safe Dial
params_guide:
Key field (JSON):
  {"combination":[3,7,2],"max":9,"labeled":true}

combination (required) — array of target integers for each dial
max         (optional) — maximum dial value 0..max, wraps around (default 9)
labeled     (optional) — show A/B/C labels above dials (default true)

description: Flip cards two at a time to find all matching pairs.
name: Memory Flip
params_guide:
Key field (JSON):
  {"pairs":4,"cols":4}

pairs (required) — number of matching pairs, integer 2–8
cols  (optional) — grid columns (default 4)

description: Toggle cells to turn all lights off. Each tap flips a cell and its 4 neighbours.
name: Lights Out
params_guide:
Key field (JSON):
  {"size":3,"moves":5}

size  (optional) — grid dimension N×N, integer 2–5 (default 3)
moves (optional) — number of random scramble moves from solved state (default 5)

description: Connect each source label to its correct target by tapping source then target.
name: Wire Connect
params_guide:
Key field (JSON):
  {"pairs":[["Red","1"],["Blue","2"],["Green","3"]],"shuffle_targets":true}

pairs           (required) — array of [source_label, target_label] string pairs
shuffle_targets (optional) — randomise the target column order each play (default true)

description: Watch the flashing panel sequence, then repeat it. Sequence grows each round.
name: Simon Says
params_guide:
Key field (JSON):
  {"length":4,"flash_sec":0.6,"panels":4}

length    (required) — total sequence length to win, integer 2–8
flash_sec (optional) — how long each panel flashes in seconds (default 0.6)
panels    (optional) — number of panels: 3 or 4 (default 4)
